question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/persistence/account.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getCryptoEntity()] Can an unprivileged user send requests with an ID-based account lookup where `selectCryptoEntityById` matches many rows in `entity_history` (due to many updates), causing the UNION ALL to return a large intermediate result before the `limit 1` is applied, consuming excessive DB memory and griefing concurrent queries?
